---
title: "Cost-Effectiveness Analysis"
description: "Conducts cost-effectiveness analysis comparing baseline SI with universal prophylaxis, tracking QALYs and costs with discounting and vital dynamics."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2021-10-01"
categories: [SI, cost-effectiveness, prophylaxis, economics, advanced]
order: 10
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
